title: ActionBase
description: The action to which this version belongs.

id.description: The unique ID of the action.

supported_triggers.description: The list of triggers that this action supports. At this time, an action can only target a single trigger at a time.

all_changes_deployed.description: True if all of an Action's contents have been deployed.

created_at.description: The time when this action was created.

updated_at.description: The time when this action was updated.
